item.title: Allura Imports Recalls Youth Sweatshirts with Bobcat Logo and Drawstrings Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Strangulation Hazard; Violates Federal Regulations for Children's Upper Outerwear
item.company: Gabe's stores from October 2025 through November 2025 for about $15.
item.brand: Gabe's stores from October 2025 through November 2025 for about $15.
item.summary: This recall involves youth sweatshirts with drawstrings. The sweatshirts are gray and have the Bobcat name and logo printed in black on the chest of the sweatshirt. The sweatshirts were sold in youth sizes 8/10 and 12/14. The size of the sweatshirt and "RN#36753" is printed on the neck label in black.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Youth Sweatshirts with Drawstrings.
item.remedy: Consumers should take the recalled clothing away from children immediately, remove the drawstrings to eliminate the hazard and contact Allura Imports for a full refund. Consumers should contact cs@alluraimports.com, with subject 'RECALL', along with their name and the date, to receive a shipping label to return the garment. Upon receipt, affected consumers will be issued a refund.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
